══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 58/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 28/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

══ ROUND 7 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: 20/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 34 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Iron Concentration HP: -14/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
